## Imports

## Config object

Dot-accessible, mutable config inspired by scanpy.cfg; remains optional
thanks to helper functions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/config.py#L18"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### DotConfig

*Dot-accessible configuration with dictionary semantics.*

A dictionary subclass that allows attribute-style access to keys. Useful
for configuration objects where `config.key` is more readable than
`config['key']`.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/config.py#L120"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### set_current_project

>  set_current_project (path:Optional[pathlib.Path])

*Set the active project path used by tools/resources.*

Updates both config.CURRENT_PROJECT and paths.CURRENT_PROJECT to ensure
consistent state across all modules.

### load_bookmarks

>  load_bookmarks ()

*Load saved project aliases from BOOKMARKS_PATH.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/config.py#L144"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### find_config_dir

>  find_config_dir ()

*Return the directory for storing MCP nbdev config (bookmarks).*

On macOS/Linux it defaults to `~/.config/mcp.nbdev`; on Windows it uses
`%APPDATA%/mcp.nbdev`. The directory is created if missing.
